summary: Iteration 2 regression + new features testing. All 8 backend tests pass. Frontend: menu images, pagination (sides 6 items / PAGE_SIZE=4, 2 pages), Google Maps iframe, directions link, reservation form toast, contact form toast, responsive (375/768/1440px - no horizontal overflow), no JS console errors on scroll.

issues: Navbar at 768px shows all links but 'RESERVE' button may be slightly clipped - minor spacing. At 375px, hamburger menu correctly appears.

critical_code_review_comments: MenuSection uses key={`${t.id}-${p}-${idx}`} for pagination which correctly re-renders items on page change.
data-testid for form fields uses 'res-*' prefix (res-name, res-email, etc.) not 'reserve-*' as originally assumed - minor naming note for future tests.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ reservation and contact entries during form tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: backend 8/8 pass, menu images render, sides pagination (2 pages, 4 items each), google-map-iframe present, map-directions-link opens Google Maps URL in _blank, reservation form (data-testid: res-name, res-phone, res-email, res-date-trigger, res-time, res-guests, res-submit) shows toast 'Table reserved!', contact form (ct-name, ct-email, ct-subject, ct-message, ct-submit) shows toast 'Message sent!'. No JS errors on scroll. No horizontal overflow at 375/768/1440px.
